description: You are a museum AV technician finalizing the 'Deep Oceans' exhibit. Standardize the three raw videos in /home/ga/Videos/raw_exhibit/ (coral_reef.avi, deep_sea_vent.mov, kelp_forest.mp4) by transcoding them to 1920x1080 resolution using H.264 video and AAC audio in an MP4 container. Save the results to /home/ga/Videos/kiosk_ready/ as exhibit_01.mp4, exhibit_02.mp4, and exhibit_03.mp4. Each video must have the museum logo (/home/ga/Pictures/museum_logo.png) burned into the bottom-right corner. Create an XSPF playlist at /home/ga/Videos/kiosk_ready/ocean_loop.xspf containing these videos in sequential order. Additionally, create an executable bash script at /home/ga/Desktop/start_kiosk.sh that launches VLC to play the playlist in a fullscreen, endless loop with the OSD and video title text popups disabled.
